title: LongCat-2.0, a large-scale MoE model with 1.6T total and 48B Active
summary: LongCat-2.0 is a large-scale Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) model with 1.6 trillion total parameters and 48 billion active parameters per token. It achieves strong performance on long-context tasks, outperforming many dense models while maintaining efficiency through sparse activation.
